The CNN model achieved the best performance, highlighting the potential of deep learning in medical image analysis.

The Dubai Property Intelligence Engine is a machine learning framework for predicting residential property prices. Built with Random Forest & XGBoost (81% R), it leverages Dubai Land Department data. It integrates SHAP for Explainable AI (XAI) and features a Streamlit dashboard for real-time market appraisals and mortgage forecasting.

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.

This study aims to develop a reliable machine learning model to predict daily stock market price movement directions. Due to the complex nature of financial markets, a blending ensemble framework is implemented, combining multiple models to improve prediction accuracy, stability, and robustness.

Recognizing that losing a customer is highly costly, this framework identifies at-risk accounts early, allowing businesses to execute proactive retention strategies before the customer leaves.

This project addresses the challenge of early identification and prediction of genetic disorders using machine learning techniques. Genetic disorders are often difficult to diagnose at an early stage because they require extensive medical testing and expert analysis.

A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.
